properties.name: Project
properties.description: A registered NaCl project record stored in ~/.nacl/projects.json; represents the analyst active project scope.

properties.name: Board
properties.description: An Excalidraw board file on disk (.excalidraw); the primary artefact that analysts view, edit, and sync with the graph.

properties.name: Board Scene
properties.description: The parsed Excalidraw JSON content (type, version, elements[], appState{}, files{}) that constitutes the visual canvas state of a board.

properties.name: Board Meta
properties.description: Sidecar .meta.json file that tracks generation and sync provenance for a board: lastGeneratedAt, lastGeneratedBy, lastSyncedAt, lastSyncStatus, lastSyncRunId, contentHashAtLastSync.

properties.name: Board Snapshot
properties.description: A versioned copy of a board scene stored in .snapshots/<board>-<timestamp>.json, used for restore and diff operations.

properties.name: Skill Run
properties.description: A single skill invocation (regenerate / sync / analyze / render-md) tracked by the run-queue with phase lifecycle.

properties.name: Batch Operation
properties.description: A sequential multi-board skill operation that drives N individual Skill Runs one after another and reports aggregate progress.

properties.name: Renderable Board
properties.description: A board the Neo4j graph indicates can be rendered right now (graph has sufficient nodes); may or may not yet exist on disk.

properties.name: Search Result
properties.description: An ephemeral full-text search hit from board elements or graph nodes: source, boardName, elementId, nodeId, snippet, score (board) or node, matchedField, snippet, score (graph).

properties.name: Diff Entry
properties.description: An element-level snapshot diff record with kind (added/removed/changed), the element before and after, and a list of changed field names (reasons).
